name: workflow-bootstrap
description: Initialize a numbered workflow workspace with global rules, TDD-first execution plans, and traceable testing templates.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize reusable collaboration workflow folders and rules.
interface.longDescription: Creates a numbered workflow directory tree with README indexing, global rules in 00-rule, TDD-first execution guidance, traceable test logs, regression and E2E templates, and a health-report baseline.
defaultPrompt: 请初始化这个项目的协作工作流
帮我初始化 workflow 目录
